positive: A stylized and symmetrical central composition featuring a whimsical grouping of bioluminescent deep-sea creatures: stylized jellyfish, smiling anglerfish, and vibrant sea flora, arranged in a mandala pattern. The artwork should utilize a limited, contrasting color palette of sapphire blues, electric teal, neon magenta, and glowing lime green. The overall style must be highly detailed vector illustration with strong, clean silhouettes and graphic line art, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Composition needs high contrast between the glowing subjects and a dark, midnight-blue background. Flat graphic elements are preferred over photorealism. Central placement, excellent negative space, high resolution.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, noise, blur, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, muddy colors, gradient, gradient background
